title: Only Libraries
description: This modpack is just libraries, i dont know why anyone would want to use this.
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280444e2c4ad9e90e9903a4e989935bcb3b93f44_0.webp)This modpack has kind-of no purpose since it's just libraries but might be useful for some. The modpack has also like no function since well it's just libraries and as previously stated: might be useful for some.

I'll only do fabric versions until i get bored or i cant anymore.
So yea by 1.20.1 i will have to add 1000+ mods so this is being archived.
